name: badjilounes
description: A personal Claude Code plugin marketplace by @codboard — CodBoard, an AgentOps task-tracking plugin for audited AI-assisted development workflows, and Sofia, a multi-channel AI social-publishing plugin.

plugins.name: codboard
plugins.description:
Give Claude Code an audited task board for the tickets it handles.

CodBoard turns external tickets into trackable requests, breaks them down into actionable tasks, keeps status, branches, pull requests and daily reports in sync, and watches open PRs for new comments or required follow-ups.

It bundles the CodBoard MCP server and watcher workflow as on-demand Claude Code skills.

Developed by @CodBoard.

plugins.name: sofia
plugins.description:
Drive Sofia — the multi-channel AI social-publishing platform — from Claude Code.

Discover what Sofia can do, create AI-driven campaigns (missions), validate or reject the proposed plan, and create and publish posts across Instagram, X, LinkedIn, TikTok and Facebook.

Bundles the Sofia MCP server (local stdio) and a campaign skill.

Developed by @badjilounes.
